steps.title: Identify the contrast
steps.content: The blank separates two seemingly contradictory strategies for naming a band: one emphasizes uniqueness/originality, the other references an already recognizable song. The transition must highlight this contrast.

steps.title: Choose the logic that signals contradiction
steps.content:
“Alternatively” introduces a contrasting option to the first strategy, aligning with the shift from “unique and original” to “recognizable song.” The other three confuse the relationship: “Thus” implies causality, “In other words” suggests restatement, and “For instance” would logically follow the first strategy—not contradict it.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
